description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build - Staging that runs on a workflow dispatch. The workflow checks out code from the master branch, populates the environment, builds and packages the project, and publishes artifacts for multiple platforms including linux-x64, linux-aarch64, win-x64, osx-x64, and osx-aarch64. It also has a stage-release job that depends on all the platform jobs, downloads artifacts, zips the Windows package, and generates SHA256 checksums for all artifacts.
